meaning: n.毛拉(伊斯兰教国家对老师,先生、学者的敬称)
examples: The Mullah couldn't break his word.
"Where did you find her?" asked the Mullah.
More arrests have now been reported including two Taliban "shadow governors" who reported to Mullah Baradar.
Mullah Abdul Salam Zaeef was arrested Thursday by Pakistani intelligence officials, his secretary said.
